inclusion_criteria: Population: Adults (≥18 years) with severe obesity (BMI ≥35 kg/m²); mixed samples are eligible only if data for the BMI ≥35 subgroup are reported separately or ≥80% of participants meet BMI ≥35.

Intervention: Online, group-based behavior change interventions for weight management (e.g., videoconference groups, group chats/forums, online group courses); primarily delivered via the internet and group-based.
Study design/comparator: Controlled quantitative studies (RCTs, cluster-RCTs, or nonrandomized controlled trials) that include a waitlist or standard care control arm.

Outcomes: Reports at least one of the following—weight loss (e.g., body weight, BMI), weight-related behavior change (e.g., diet, physical activity, sedentary behavior), or user perceptions of acceptability/usability/experience collected from participants in the eligible trial.
exclusion_criteria: Population not exclusively adult or not severe obesity (BMI <35 kg/m²) and no separable data for BMI ≥35.

Interventions that are not online and group-based (e.g., individual-only digital programs, face-to-face/telephone-only delivery, hybrid dominated by in-person care) or primarily pharmacologic/surgical/device-focused without a behavioral group component.
No appropriate comparator or study design (e.g., single-arm pre–post studies, uncontrolled feasibility/pilots, or trials with only active comparators without a waitlist/standard care arm).
No relevant outcomes (no data on weight, weight-related behaviors, or user perceptions of acceptability/usability/experience).
screening_criteria.description: Screen for controlled studies of adults with severe obesity testing online, group-based behavior change interventions versus waitlist or standard care, reporting weight, behavior change, and/or user perception outcomes.
